metadata.description: Ziarmy — personal multi-agent team skills: build with dev-team, ship with deploy-team

plugins.name: ziarmy
plugins.description: Multi-agent development force: dev-team decomposes complex work into a dependency-ordered task graph and runs it with parallel Sonnet 5 executors, Opus 4.8 reviewers between tasks, and a single Fable 5 advisor (max 10 concurrent agents). deploy-team takes the finished build and handles GitHub repo/CI, Docker builds, image pushes, Kubernetes, or provider-native deploys — provider chosen by the user, production gated behind explicit confirmation. Caveman mode: one-line statuses, one-line questions, hard-capped agent reports.
